element_introduction_order.mastery_context: LifeCursor system for clicking on NPCs and interactive objects
Active Time Battle meter system; enemies visible on field maps, non-random encounters
Lockpicking and puzzle-solving; unlocked progressively through story
Awakened through plot progression; eight elemental types; crafted using colored bugs and Elementor Hosts
NRG for MysTech and shields; Bouge auto-fills for BattleSkills with varying effects
Unlocked through character plot development; powered by Bouge meter
Up to three active characters; roster rotation between encounters
Unlocks access to multiple planets; triggers cinematic transitions
Fighter spaceship missions with laser combat; 2D puzzle games (Ox, Bugaboo)
Optional collection tool and quest objective component

typical_relief_triggers: Entering safe zones and NPC dialogue
Healing via MysTech slags and items
Completing story segments that unlock new abilities
typical_tension_triggers: Visible enemy encounters on field maps
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating exploration-dialogue phases with turn-based combat encounters; story progression gates unlock new mechanics and planetary areas, creating macro-level pacing rhythm

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Colored bugs scattered on small hills in various locations signal MysTech crafting material availability; treasure placement in field maps

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic combat and exploration mechanics; visible non-random enemies allow player positioning strategy
difficulty_curve.mid_game: MysTech system awakening and resource management complexity (NRG, Bouge bars); puzzle-solving via character unique skills increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multi-planetary scope; character plot-gated BattleSkill unlocks; minigame challenge sequences (fighter combat)
notable_spikes: MysTech system awakening and mastery requirements
Story-dependent BattleSkill unlocks creating ability windows

notable_level_patterns.description: 3D explorable environments (futuristic cities, space vessels, outdoor areas) with non-random, visible enemy placement; LifeCursor interaction system for NPCs and objects
Certain plot developments unlock character BattleSkills and MysTech system functionality; creates progression gates between exploration phases
After certain progression, shuttle travel unlocks access to multiple distinct planetary locations with cinematic transitions; expands scope of exploration
Dedicated sequences with different mechanics (spaceship fighter combat with lasers; 2D puzzle games) interrupt standard exploration-combat rhythm

sources_used: Wikipedia - Anachronox article (Gameplay section, MysTech subsection, Plot/Setting, Development)
